name: Zion Acacia Wood Square Patio Coffee Table - Teak - Christopher Knight Home: Iron Frame, Weather-Resistant
description: This rustic, industrial Christopher Knight Home Zion Acacia Wood Square Coffee Table is a great addition to any backyard setup. Featuring an acacia wood table top set upon an iron frame for a true, authentic rustic feel. This table is both sturdy and stylish, the perfect combo for any patio setup. Treated specifically for the outdoors, you will be very happy with this Christopher Knight Home Zion Acacia Wood Square Coffee Table. A must have for any garden, backyard or patio.
